differentials.name: Primitive neuroectodermal tumor
differentials.raw: Primitive neuroectodermal tumor (in children, part of Ewing sarcoma family of tumors)

differentials.name: Rhabdomyosarcoma (b)  Solid mesenchymal tumor (1%) Benign primary nonepithelial neoplasms of the pancreas are a rare group of usually sharply marginated solid and cystic tumors.
